violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Cold hold is at 45 F. Recommend keeping lid closed when not in use.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Containers in the glass door refrigerator up front not date marked.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Sides of equipment need cleaning.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood needs cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Facility in need of cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor in the kitchen in need of repair.
